reviews.comment:
Te permiten pasar la noche en el coche, tiene baño, las personas que te atienden son muy agradables, te explican lo que deseeas conocer. Una parada buenisima

(Translated by Google)
They allow you to spend the night in the car. It has a bathroom. The people who help you are very pleasant and explain everything you need to know. A great stop.

reviews.comment:
De las peores estaciones de servicio que visite, pésima atención en el despacho de combustible y malisima atención el Shop. Si pueden no vayan, la van a pasar muy mal

(Translated by Google)
One of the worst gas stations I've ever been to. Terrible service at the pump and awful service in the convenience store. If you can, avoid it; you'll have a terrible experience.
